name: ONE Group Hospitality, Inc.
business: ONE Group Hospitality is an international restaurant company that owns, operates, manages, franchises, and licenses upscale and polished casual restaurant brands including STK, Benihana, Kona Grill, and RA Sushi. It also provides food and beverage hospitality management services to hotels and casinos. The company sells premium steakhouse, teppanyaki, sushi, and American grill cuisine in high-energy atmospheres.

exposures.sentence: We are an international restaurant company that develops, owns and operates, manages, franchises and licenses upscale and polished casual, high-energy restaurants.
The restaurant industry has in the past faced labor challenges, particularly coming out of the COVID-19 pandemic.
The rapid evolution and increased adoption of artificial intelligence technologies may intensify our cybersecurity risks.

catalysts.event: Open Company-owned Kona Grill restaurant in San Antonio, Texas
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we opened a Company-owned Kona Grill restaurant in San Antonio, Texas, a relocation of an existing Kona Grill restaurant.

catalysts.event: Convert franchised Benihana restaurant to Company-owned in Monterey, California
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we converted a franchised Benihana restaurant to a Company-owned Benihana restaurant in Monterey, California.

catalysts.event: Convert five Company-owned Grill restaurants to Benihana or STK formats by end of 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to convert up to an additional nine Company-owned Grill restaurants to Benihana or STK formats, with five that are expected to be converted by the end of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Potential to grow STK brand to 200 restaurants globally
tamClaims.sentence: We have identified over 75 additional major metropolitan areas across the globe where we could grow our STK brand to 200 restaurants over the foreseeable future.

tamClaims.claim: Potential to grow Benihana brand to 400 restaurants
tamClaims.sentence: We believe we could grow the Benihana brand to 400 restaurants over the foreseeable future.
